config.fileNotFoundHint: Run `calendit config set-google --id <id> --secret <secret>` (or see docs) to create your configuration.

auth.googleLoginHint: See docs/setup_google.md or run `calendit config set-google --file <path>`.

datetime.invalidParseHint: Check the value. Use HH:mm for times (e.g. today 10:00).

service.outlookNoMsalAccounts: No Outlook sign-in found in the MSAL cache.
service.outlookAccountMismatch: No cached Outlook account matches context accountId "{expected}". Cached usernames: {cached}
service.outlookAccountMismatchHint: In the browser sign-in UI, choose "{expected}" and run `calendit auth login outlook --set <context>` again. You may have signed in with a different Microsoft account.

context.missingHint: Run `calendit config set-context {name} --service google --calendar primary` to create it.
context.loadFailed: Failed to load configuration. Run 'calendit --help' for setup instructions.
context.loadFailedHint: Run `calendit config set-google` (etc.) to set up.

cmd.macosTransportSet: EventKit default transport is now '{value}' (applies when CALENDIT_EVENTKIT_BRIDGE is not set in the environment).

check.googleNotSet: Google credentials : NOT SET (run: calendit config set-google --id <id> --secret <secret>)
check.outlookNotSet: Outlook credentials: NOT SET (run: calendit config set-outlook --id <id>)

bootstrap.prompt: Choose your language for calendit messages:

bridge.tokenMissing: EventKit bridge token not found at {path}.
bridge.hintStartBridge: Start the bridge: calendit macos bridge start, or open CalenditEventKitBridge.app (e.g. in /Applications).
bridge.connectFailed: Could not connect to the EventKit bridge at {path}: {message}.
bridge.timeout: EventKit bridge did not respond within {ms} ms.
bridge.invalidJson: Invalid JSON from the EventKit bridge: {line}
bridge.closedWithoutResponse: The EventKit bridge closed before sending a response.

helper.hintBuild: Set CALENDIT_EVENTKIT_HELPER, or run: (cd native/eventkit-helper && swift build -c release).
helper.timeout: EventKit helper did not complete within {ms} ms.

bridge.openFailed: Could not open the bridge app: {message}.
bridge.opened: Launched {path}. Wait a few seconds, then run: calendit macos doctor
bridge.notFound: CalenditEventKitBridge.app not found. After `calendit macos bridge fetch` + `bridge build`, `.build` under the bridge root and ~/Applications are searched automatically. Otherwise install a release, use Homebrew when available, or run `bridge build` then `macos bridge start`.
bridge.buildNoSource: EventKit bridge sources are not available next to this install. Use a full git clone, or set CALENDIT_EVENTKIT_BRIDGE_ROOT to your native/eventkit-bridge directory.
bridge.buildCopyUserOk: Copied bridge .app to {path} (usable from `calendit macos bridge start`).
bridge.buildCopySystemSkipped: Skipped copy to /Applications ({message}). Copy manually or use sudo if you need it there.
bridge.fetchIntro: Download the calendit repository snapshot from GitHub, extract only native/eventkit-bridge, and place it under your calendit data directory (next to the bridge token when using the default location). A Swift build (see next step) will compile CalenditEventKitBridge.app.
bridge.fetchSizeUnknown: unknown (HEAD did not return Content-Length; may be a few MB)
bridge.fetchBuildPrompt: Run the Swift build now to create CalenditEventKitBridge.app? (requires Xcode Command Line Tools: swift, codesign)
bridge.fetchOk: Fetched EventKit bridge sources to {path}. You can run: calendit macos bridge start (after build) or calendit macos setup.
bridge.fetchSkipsExisting: Bridge sources already exist at {path}. Use --force to re-download, or run: calendit macos bridge build
bridge.fetchNoTty: Non-interactive: use --yes to confirm the download, or use an interactive terminal.

setup.noTransport: EventKit is not available: no helper binary and no ready local bridge. Build the helper, start the EventKit bridge, or see docs.
setup.tcc: Allow Calendar access for CalenditEventKitBridge: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Calendars. When done, press Enter here to re-check.
setup.pickCalendar: Which calendar should this context use?
setup.noCalendars: No calendars were returned (or access was denied).
setup.startBridgePrompt: The bridge does not seem to be running. Open CalenditEventKitBridge.app now?

external.badSubHint: Examples: calendit macos external doctor  |  calendit macos external list-calendars --json  |  calendit macos external shell
external.opened: Opened Terminal.app — check the new window. Command: {cmd}
external.osascriptFailed: Could not open Terminal.app via AppleScript: {message}
external.suggestionWhenDenied: Calendar access is denied from this terminal. Run: calendit macos external doctor (permission prompt in Terminal), or calendit macos external shell (open Terminal here for all macos / query commands).
